name: S-14 standards-add --emit-audit records a jsonl line with id url ts on each invocation
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" https://example.com/spec --id example-spec --emit-audit audit.jsonl && [ -s audit.jsonl ] && grep -q '"command":"standards-add"' audit.jsonl && grep -q '"id":"example-spec"' audit.jsonl && echo audited 1>&2
